"'''Ask Lobot'''" is a regular feature of the ''[[Star Wars Insider]]'' magazine, where [[Leland Chee]] answers ''[[Star Wars]]'' questions sent in by readers. ''Ask Lobot'' succeeded the earlier [[Star Wars Q&A|''Star Wars'' Q&A]] department in [[Star Wars Insider 101|''Star Wars Insider'' 101]] as part of the magazine's new look and has featured in every issue since then, spread throughout the [[Blaster (department)|''Blaster'']] section.
